items.headline: Do Rising Earnings Estimates Reframe Albemarle's (ALB) Lithium Strategy as Discipline or Cyclicality?
items.snippet: Analysts lifted earnings estimates ahead of August 5, 2026 earnings release. Strong Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

items.headline: Albemarle Stock Loses 25% in a Month: What Should Investors Do Now?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation's ALB shares have tumbled 25.5% in the past month, underperforming the Zacks Chemical - Diversified industry and the S&P 500's declines of 6.7% and 0.1%, respectively. Falling lithium market prices are weighing on the ALB stock lately.

items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Chinese spot lithium prices have climbed back into the $23/kg range, up from $10/kg low in fall 2024. Analysts project a 4% global lithium supply deficit for 2026.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand... Investment opinion 'Buy' - Citi
items.snippet: Citi raised its investment opinion on Albemarle from 'High Risk' to 'Buy'. Target price remains at $225.
